ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Nov-13-2018 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Aug-29-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Todd Murray for Petitioner.
Milton Katz for Objectors.

The Court noted that the last issue to be dealt with are the objections related to the extraordinary fees. Mr. Katz stated that he again looked over exhibit 1 (itemized statement of time spent in connection with the sale of the property), that he thinks the entire amount of $5,285.00 should not be accepted as extraordinary fees, and that he believes clearing title and reviewing escrow documments are routine matters when an estate involves real property. The Second Amended First and Final Account and Report of Administrator, etc. is under submission.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.
